Crypto exchanges provide the infrastructure to match buyers and sellers, custody assets (hot and cold wallets), and process fiat-to-crypto and crypto-to-fiat transactions.
They also maintain order books, provide market data, and offer payment rails for INR deposits and withdrawals.
Additionally, they facilitate a safe, transparent, and reliable trading environment.
Key functions of crypto exchanges include managing user accounts, onboarding and KYC verification to meet compliance requirements, and offering advanced features such as spot trading for buyers and sellers to make orders.
